recommendations.title: 3 Hearts
recommendations.overview: A twist of fate leaves a hapless accountant romantically torn between two sisters.

recommendations.title: Farewell, My Queen
recommendations.overview: A look at the relationship between Marie Antoinette and one of her readers during the final days of the French Revolution.

recommendations.title: Eva
recommendations.overview: A playwright encounters a mysterious woman when he takes shelter in a chalet during a violent snowstorm and becomes obsessed with her.

recommendations.title: Perfume: The Story of a Murderer
recommendations.overview: Jean-Baptiste Grenouille, born in the stench of 18th century Paris, develops a superior olfactory sense, which he uses to create the world's finest perfumes. However, his work takes a dark turn as he tries to preserve scents in the search for the ult

recommendations.title: The Witch
recommendations.overview: In 1630, a farmer relocates his family to a remote plot of land on the edge of a forest where strange, unsettling things happen. With suspicion and paranoia mounting, each family member's faith, loyalty and love are tested in shocking ways.

recommendations.title: Train Dreams
recommendations.overview: A logger leads a life of quiet grace as he experiences love and loss during an era of monumental change in early 20th-century America.

recommendations.title: Daddio
recommendations.overview: A woman taking a cab ride from JFK airport engages in a conversation with the driver about the important relationships in their lives.

recommendations.title: Godland
recommendations.overview: In the late 19th century, a young Danish priest travels to a remote part of Iceland to build a church and photograph its people. But the deeper he goes into the unforgiving landscape, the more he strays from his purpose, the mission and morality.

recommendations.title: Children of Paradise
recommendations.overview: In a chaotic 19th-century Paris teeming with aristocrats, thieves, psychics, and courtesans, theater mime Baptiste is in love with the mysterious actress Garance. But Garance, in turn, is loved by three other men: pretentious actor Frederick, connivi

recommendations.title: The Duchess
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of the life of 18th century aristocrat Georgiana, Duchess of Devonshire, who was reviled for her extravagant political and personal life.
